name: alexmskills
description: A curated marketplace of reusable, self-improving Claude Code skills and agents. Each skill is an independently versioned plugin.

plugins.name: evolving-claude-md
plugins.description: Turn CLAUDE.md into a living Decisions & Learnings log that prunes, graduates, and archives itself via three hooks (audit, lint, archive).

plugins.name: dev-crew
plugins.description: A self-evolving delivery crew: it composes a task-fit roster of role subagents (each on its own model tier) and runs them as a gated relay to deliver a target. architect → dev → qa → deployer is just one example lineup — the roster is chosen for the work.

plugins.name: brainstorm-panel
plugins.description: Assemble a task-fit panel of role-specialized agents, pick a coordination style, and run a generate-critique-refine loop that converges on a strong result.

plugins.name: learn-on-failure
plugins.description: Auto-save a durable learning to project memory whenever a task takes more than one fix cycle to resolve.

plugins.name: implement-issue
plugins.description: Drive a GitHub issue from branch to PR with a guided plan → implement → verify → push workflow.

plugins.name: maven-quality
plugins.description: Format, static-analysis, coverage, and pre-commit skills for Maven/Java projects (codestyle, precommit, jacoco).

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: Scan a codebase for OWASP-style vulnerabilities (injection, path traversal, unsafe reflection/deserialization, secrets).

plugins.name: review-agents
plugins.description: Read-only specialist subagents for code review, test running, and dependency/CVE auditing on lighter model tiers.

plugins.name: research-sweep
plugins.description: A self-evolving 'discover' crew: it composes a task-fit team of coverage roles for an information space, fans them out in parallel, dedups, and adversarially verifies the findings. The discover counterpart to dev-crew (deliver) and brainstorm-panel (decide).

plugins.name: roles
plugins.description: A per-repo repository of evolving roles (.claude/roles/) usable solo, as dev-crew roles, as brainstorm-panel seats, and as research-sweep coverage roles — with seed personas, init + graduation-audit hook, and the shared-core convention.

plugins.name: screenshot-tour
plugins.description: Build a presentation-ready screenshot deck of the current product — discovers the aspects worth showing, proposes an editable plan, captures each with the right tool per surface (project's existing browser driver for web, VHS for CLI, Freeze for code), and assembles a captioned, narrative-ordered deck under presentation/. Slide-deck export and README integration are opt-in follow-ups.

plugins.name: prompt-coach-beta
plugins.description: Watches every prompt you send Claude Code and nudges you toward better prompting habits — fundamentals (definition-of-done, guardrails, verification), classical techniques (few-shot, chain-of-thought, rubric, uncertainty budget), goals & loops, Claude-Code-native tool delegation (plan mode, TaskCreate, parallel agents, roles, brainstorm-panel, Workflow), and skill-awareness (rule of three). Also cheers you on: 19 positive detectors with sparing, evidence-based praise (Brophy/Dweck/Fogg/Kohn). Conversational short-circuit skips analysis on approvals / multi-choice picks / continuations. Typo-tolerant Levenshtein pre-pass for dyslexic-friendly matching. Configurable nudge_style (both / silent / log-only). Beta — the `-beta` suffix is intentional; graduates to `prompt-coach` when it earns its stable slot.

plugins.name: tune-repo-beta
plugins.description: Audit and tighten a repo's CLAUDE.md and guardrails so Claude Code works faster and more accurately in it: verify CLAUDE.md against reality, tighten the verify loop, add missing static guardrails, cut permission friction. Beta — the `-beta` suffix is intentional; graduates to `tune-repo` when it earns its stable slot.
